title: size test platform-dependent on 32-bit targets
description: eval_size_test converts the u64 limit to usize with unwrap_or(usize::MAX). On 32-bit targets where usize is u32, a script containing 'size :over 5000000000' (>u32::MAX) silently saturates to usize::MAX, making the test always false. The bug is invisible: the script compiles, evaluates, and returns Keep rather than a diagnostic. Documents as a known limitation, or use u64 throughout the size comparison path rather than converting to usize.
